General.Name: E -Commodities Holdings Ltd
General.Description: E-Commodities Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the processing and trading of coal and other products. It operates through two segments, Trading of Coal and Other Products; and Rendering of Integrated Supply Chain Services. The company also offers supply chain trading and technology services; and constructs, manages, and operates mining equipment, processing factories, and logistics parks, as well as renders mining, consigned processing, and logistics services. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Indonesia, Malaysia, Mongolia, South Korea, India, Japan, Vietnam, the Netherlands, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Winsway Enterprises Holdings Limited and changed its name to E-Commodities Holdings Limited in August 2016. E-Commodities Holdings Limited has a strategic alliance with Bridge Mining Pte. Ltd. to collaborate on integrated coal mining, logistics, and off-take services. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. E-Commodities Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Famous Speech Limited.
